event: Departure of the Bucentaur toward Venice Lido on Ascension Day
description: A panoramic view of the Venetian lagoon showing the ceremonial departure of the Bucentaur, the Doge's ornate state barge. The large gilded vessel dominates the center of the composition, surrounded by numerous smaller boats and gondolas. The Venice skyline with its distinctive domes, campanili, and buildings stretches across the background. Crowds gather on the waterfront at left. The scene captures a festive maritime celebration with activity on the water and shore. The palette is soft with silvery blues, warm golds, and the atmospheric haze characteristic of Guardi's vedute.

_meta.title: Departure of the Bucentaur Towards the Venice Lido on Ascension Day
